extensionDesc.message: Sovereign client-side security layer for UID.one. Enforces Zero-Trust, DLP protection, session binding, and SSD anti-tracking.

errorVaultNotFound.message: Error: Vault not found for this website.

errorNoUsernameProvided.message: Please enter your email or username first to use your Passkey.

setupGuidance.message: First time setup: Please enter your email and password to log in normally. A secure Passkey vault will be created automatically!

vaultConnectedDesc.message: Zero-Trust security active. Passkeys and credentials synced securely with vault.

waitingForLoginDesc.message: Log in to your uid.one web account. The extension will synchronize and pair automatically.

activeDlpInterceptorDesc.message: Analyze uploads, copies, and form submissions

dialogDesc.message: Please open your UID.one mobile app or visit uid.one to select the matching number.

signatureTitle.message: This email is digitally signed by UID.one

alertLinkFirst.message: Please link your UID.one account before performing digital signature.

alertRejected.message: Signing request was rejected or expired.

notificationSignPdfErrorMsg.message: Cannot sign PDF directly inside this browser PDF viewer. Please right-click a PDF link instead.

pdfSignerLoadError.message: Failed to load PDF file. Please check if the file is accessible.

otpPromptDesc.message: Please enter the 6-digit OTP code to verify your digital signature:

otpErrorLength.message: The OTP code must be exactly 6 digits.

alertSessionExpired.message: Session expired or not linked. Please log in to UID.one and click 'Link Extension' to continue.

warningInvalidSignature.message: Invalid signature or email has been tampered with.

warningPublicKeyFailed.message: Failed to load sender's public key: $1

warningContentTampered.message: Digital signature does not match email content (Content has been modified).

alertVerifiedSender.message: This email is digitally signed and verified by UID.one for sender: $1

reasonUnsignedSensitive.message: Unsigned email contains sensitive financial keywords.

reasonSignedImportant.message: Email from trusted partner contains important action request.

floatingTooltipMismatch.message: Sender email ($1) does not match UID identity ($2)

errorFetchPdf.message: Failed to fetch or hash PDF. Please make sure the link is accessible.

pdfSignerSubtitle.message: Zero-Trust PDF cryptographic verification & digital stamps.

pdfSignerUsbNoDetect.message: No USB token detected. Plug in your USB and click detect.

pdfSignerAgentOfflineDesc.message: CA client application is not running or not installed on this computer.

pdfSignerUsbNotFoundDesc.message: CA client app is active, but no USB token or smart card is found. Please insert your USB Token.

pdfSignerUsbSuccessDesc.message: Connected. USB Token certificates are ready.

pdfSignerInstructionsText.message: Select the target page and drag the green box to position your signature stamp. Click the button below to sign the PDF.

pdfSignerPinDesc.message: Please enter your USB Token PIN to authorize the digital signature:

pdfSignerPinError.message: The USB PIN must be between 4 and 8 digits.

pdfSignerRemoteDesc.message: A push notification has been sent to your $1 mobile app linked with identifier $2. Please approve it on your phone to complete signing.
